---
name: Documentation Update
about: Suggest improvements or report errors in documentation
title: '[DOC] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Description of the Documentation Issue
Please describe where the documentation can be improved or what is missing.

## 🎯 Proposed Changes
Outline the exact additions or revisions you recommend.

## 🧭 Location of Documentation
Provide file paths or section names (e.g., `docs/Installation.md` or `README.md`).

## 🤝 Additional Context
Add any other details or screenshots that might support this request.
